releases.label: DR5
releases.summary: Final release (KiDS-Legacy): 1,347 deg² in 9 bands (ugri + VIKING ZYJHKs, plus i2); lensing sample of ~43M sources over 967 deg² after masking.

releases.label: DR4
releases.summary: KiDS-1000: 1,006 deg² with 9-band photometry and lensfit shear catalog; basis of the KiDS-1000 cosmic-shear cosmology.

releases.label: DR3
releases.summary: 447 deg² of ugri imaging with photo-z; KiDS-450 cosmic-shear analysis.
